title: Golden Crispy Algerian Chorizo Skewers
description: A briny and crispy Algerian dish featuring chorizo, perfect for a quick snack or appetizer, this halal-friendly recipe is sure to energize your taste buds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted score fat, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced chorizo to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chorizo onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.
